title: Roadmap Entry
description: Promises, dependencies, and strategic hedges for plans that are one staffing change away from becoming philosophy.

category.description: Category slug used in API paths.

tags.description: Searchable tags for browsing and filtering.

created_at.description: Initial publication date in ISO local date form.

updated_at.description: Most recent update date in ISO local date form.

promise.description: Thing the roadmap says is coming.

actual_dependency.description: What really has to happen first.

delivery_risk.description: Likelihood that the date is fiction.

truth.description: Most honest sentence about the item.

hedge.description: How the commitment gets phrased to survive reality.
